claim: Once the serving implementation lives behind intelligence_serving, factory modules should call that namespace directly instead of the legacy top-level serving aliases.
mechanism: gap_analyzer.py uses serving behavior only for skill generation. Repointing that import to the namespace-local intelligence-serving module reduces cross-surface alias reach-through without changing factory behavior.
boundary: This cleanup is limited to one factory-to-serving import path. It does not change gap analysis logic or the generated skill content.
